brainrot
https://github.com/deepmroot/brainrot

Purpose:
Cross-agent doomscroll mode for coding sessions. Opens a real short-form feed or local fake feed while the agent works, then hides and resumes later when possible.

Supported agents:
- Claude Code
- Gemini CLI
- Codex
- pi (manual skill-style install)

Best install hint for agents:
- Open README.md and AGENTS.md
- Run: node bin/install.js
- If pi is in use, also copy:
  agents/brainrot.md -> ~/.pi/agent/skills/brainrot/SKILL.md

Main user command:
/brainrot

Validation:
npm test
